title: polygala crenata
intro: Polygala crenata, also known as Chinese milkwort or crenate milkwort, is a species of flowering plant in the milkwort family (Polygalaceae). This plant is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Polygala crenata include reducing symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as alleviating conditions such as rheumatism and skin ulcers. In herbal preparations, Polygala crenata is often dried and used in decoctions, infusions, or made into capsules, or it is used in combination with other herbs to create tonics and remedies for various health conditions.
